title: Financial Institutions Embrace Prediction Markets Amid Regulatory Uncertainty
summary: Despite ongoing legal battles, financial institutions are increasingly involved in prediction markets.

title: Crypto Firms Blame Downsizing on AI, Some Shift Focus Entirely
summary: Gemini and Crypto.com cite AI as a factor in downsizing, while others abandon crypto for AI's higher profits.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates AI's disruptive influence, prompting crypto firms to adapt or shift focus to more profitable ventures.

title: Kalshi Defends Prediction Market Model Amid Gambling Concerns

title: Oil Surges, Stocks Drop Amid Stagflation Fears After U.S. Jobs Report
summary: Oil prices hit 2023 highs due to the Iran war, causing stocks to fall amid concerns of stagnating growth and high inflation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the negative impact of geopolitical tensions on the economy, leading to market instability and inflation worries.

title: $25 Million Crypto Stablecoin Exploit Linked to Compromised AWS Keys
